_comment: Schema for NCI_Commands.json - the live override channel the Python brain writes into MT4's MFiles folder. NCI_GodMode_v4_0_Fusion.mq4 reads this on every new bar and on each OnTimer heartbeat. All fields are OPTIONAL; missing keys keep the EA's extern defaults. No secrets ever live here.
_trading_enabled: bool. false = EA reports/manages but places no new orders (kill switch).
_min_confluence: int 1..15. Overrides InpMinConfluence for the GodMode main port. Values outside 1..15 are ignored.
_risk_mult: float 0<rm<=3. Scales risk-per-trade (e.g. 0.5 = half size during news, 1.5 = press a hot streak). Values outside range are ignored.
_block_until: int server-epoch seconds. While TimeCurrent() < block_until the EA opens NO new trades (news/event blackout). 0 = no blackout. Set from the Python carry-trade / economic-calendar overlay.
